Call ID: EXT-027
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-28
Topic: Expansion & Upsell
Participants: Mei (account manager); Elena (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Mei): Hi Elena, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Elena): We're scaling headcount and will need a lot more seats next quarter.
AM (Mei): That's fantastic — let's scope a rollout plan for the second unit.
Customer (Elena): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Mei): Let me set up a demo of the analytics module for your team.
Customer (Elena): Love it. Let's get the paperwork moving.
AM (Mei): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
